docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,576.69 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT STREIFF, ROBERT F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-02-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
